summary: Admin Transactions CRUD API Tests - All 28 tests PASSED. Verified: 1) Admin GET /api/admin/transactions/{user_id} returns transactions from all 4 collections with pagination and type filtering, 2) Admin PUT edit with audit log, 3) Admin DELETE soft-delete, 4) Admin POST restore, 5) Admin POST refund validation (already refunded, credit txn rejection), 6) PRC Statement reads from 4 collections (prc_ledger, transactions, prc_transactions, ledger), 7) PRC Statement filters soft-deleted transactions, 8) TYPE_MAP includes all required types (daily_streak, achievement, admin_refund, order_refund, gift_subscription, subscription_refund, dmt_refund).
critical_code_review_comments: admin_transactions.py: Correctly searches all 4 collections (transactions, prc_transactions, prc_ledger, ledger)
admin_transactions.py: Edit endpoint creates audit log in audit_logs collection with old/new values
admin_transactions.py: Delete is soft-delete (sets deleted=true, not actual removal)
admin_transactions.py: Refund validates: 1) not already refunded, 2) amount < 0 (debit only), 3) user exists
admin_transactions.py: Refund creates new transaction record with type=admin_refund
prc_statement.py line 95,116,140,166: All 4 collection queries filter deleted: {$ne: True}
prc_statement.py TYPE_MAP line 21-41: Includes all required types (daily_streak, achievement, admin_refund, order_refund, gift_subscription, subscription_refund, dmt_refund)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and transactions
